name: Nalanda SkillFlow AI — Launch Readiness
purpose: Creator launch prompt: Nalanda SkillFlow AI is ready for launch. Run FoXYiZ smoke on core routes (Explore, Learning Path, Quiz, AI Tutor), QA Hunter manual pass on UX gaps, Nalanda community shares the learn path — then BRAHL Go/No-Go.
prompt: Here is my web app https://nalanda.base44.app/ — Nalanda SkillFlow AI. We're ready for launch. Give me a health report and Go/No-Go: can we ship?

chat_messages.text: Hi — I'm your BRAHL Build assistant. What are you trying to test or improve?
Here is my web app https://nalanda.base44.app/ — Nalanda SkillFlow AI. We're ready for launch. Give me a health report and Go/No-Go status.

Got it. I'll scope launch readiness: FoXYiZ smoke on landing + Explore + Learning Path + Quiz + AI Tutor, invite a QA Hunter for UX/accessibility on mobile, and link the Nalanda community learn path. Set budget below — suggest 55% automation / 45% human for a launch gate.

hitl_stories.title: Mobile learning path UX
hitl_stories.description: Safari iOS — Learning Path cards readable, no horizontal scroll breakage

hitl_stories.title: Quiz flow happy path
hitl_stories.description: Guest user can start a quiz without auth errors

hitl_stories.title: AI Tutor first message
hitl_stories.description: AI Tutor page loads and chat/input is usable
